item.title: FitG Cover Box Layout
item.description: Scanned Box Layout Freedom in the Galaxy is SPI’s version of Star Wars, from 1979. It is one of my treasured games, despite not being great solo, and being prety imbalanced. My box reflects its well-loved history, but the box scan on Boardgamegeek was really poor, so I scanned my box at 600ppi, using vuescan Of course, boxes were printed and folded, with 2" sides in the case of FitG, so I have a Photoshop PSD template with a set of 5 masks for the front and sides.

item.title: Hugo posts and images
item.description: Hugo and Image Content Management The Hugo site generator has enormous flexibility in content, which is powerful, but confusing, as there is no single best practice. Adding images to posts can be a pita, as they are usually stored in a (static) content folder, with a reference like ![Hugo images](img/tech-hugo-images.jpg) but this doesn’t work in preview, so the alternative is to set up each post as a folder, with an index.

item.title: About
item.description: About wartwork is a wargame artwork blog from John Edwards, the publisher of https://www.simpubs.org, the archive of SPI games. In re-creating classic artwork of the 70s and 80s, mainly from SPI, GDW and The Avalon Hill Games Company (aka AH, or TAHGC), I have learned a lot about design principles and practices. This site is intended to bring some together and publish them to share with like minded enthusiasts/fools.

item.title: Favourite Wargames
item.description: wartwork’s Favourite Wargames wartwork is all about wargames, and we have some favourites. As you will see elsewhere, classic 70s and 80s games from SPI and GDW are our top picks, even today. Top of the Pops These are 10 (+) of our all time favourites, in no particular order Panzgruppe Guderian (SPI) Fire in the East/Scorched Earth (GDW) Smolensk: Barbarossa Derailed (OCS Series, MMP) Atlantic Wall (SPI and Decision Games) Pandora - The Voyage of the BSM Pandora and The Wreck of the BSM Pandora (SPI) Cobra (SPI and Decision Games) Napoleon’s Last Battles (SPI) Holland ‘44 (GMT) Freedom in the Galaxy (SPI) Twilight Struggle (GMT) Guderian gets in for the game and the system, spawning Operation Typhoon, The Army Group South quad, and many more.

item.title: Pandora Counters
item.description: The Voyage and Wreck of the BSM Pandora The two Pandora games published in Ares magazine are SPI classics. wartwork has been working to clean up and re-create them for fun, possible use in a vassal module, or for use in some Universe campaigns. My preferred model for counters now is SVG, which is compact and really crisp at all sizes. The counter work is available on Github at https://github.com/jzedwards/jzcounters/tree/main/pandora

item.title: Contact
item.description: Contact You can contact wartwork on Twitter, Facebook or email with the links at the top. Some of our content is also on github at jzedwards. Privacy We don’t keep any information about you, so can’t have any privacy obligations.

item.title: Warts
